response: The April campaign produced 45 K impressions, 2.3 K clicks (5.1% CTR), and 187 sign-ups (8.1% conversion) at a cost of $12 K, yielding a $64 CAC and showing a 1.2 pp CTR increase but a 0.8 pp conversion decrease versus March. Marketing recommends running an A/B test on the landing-page CTA to improve conversions.
